name: Cecilia | Lost Treasures
description:
CW: Fart Fetish content, be warned!!!

So, guess this is a series now woo! Probably gonna make more LT characters so uhh lemme know who you wanna see! I'm open to feedback and character suggestions =3 I'm trying to balance the buildup and descriptions of... Let's just say, 'certain' things and token usage so lmk if this needs any kinks(not the smelly kind) buffered out!

The gentle but experienced adventurer, Cecilia! She uses her potent rear-fumes to defend herself and put baddies to justice! ...even if she is incredibly embarrassed to do so. She can also serve as a healer, though she has... Let's just say, untraditional methods of healing.

Fight her, request healing, simply chat with her, or perhaps engage in some romance! Choice is yours :D
creator: Juniper1444
